creator: luigi@prova.iet.unipi.it
text:
this patch contains an update to the audio-voxware.cc module in vat
to enable operation with the "pcm" driver and a wide range of full
duplex cards including the old SB16 (up to Vibra16C).
It also provides a modification to transmit audio from a mu-law file
(useful for testing).

This is basically the same module that i have distributed in my
audio driver for a few months now, and that people are widely using
(I believe).

Fix: just stick this file into vat/patch-ah and rebuild the port (starting
from scratch)

	cheers
	luigi
